name: l7_holes_collapse_gate_90
description: Trigger survival mode when hole count exceeds 90 to prevent terminal collapse trajectories on wide-board runs.
llm_notes: Failure episodes average 99.66 holes vs 75.22 in successes (delta 24.44), while height differs by only 0.41 (20.00 vs 19.59), so hole-threshold gating should separate collapse states earlier.

name: l7_opening_hole_penalty_20
description: Extend strong hole suppression through the first 20 pieces to reduce early-board damage before midgame stabilization.
llm_notes: Failures end after only 23.23 pieces on average with 99.66 holes, and success dissection shows lower outlier early holes (78.8) than baseline early holes (85.7), so a longer opening discipline window is justified.

name: l7_surface_volatility_brake_height_gate
description: Keep bumpiness control but activate a stronger survive-mode gate once stack height enters the danger band.
llm_notes: Bumpiness is a large separator (7.92 failure vs 1.44 success), but level-7 average height is already high (19.63), so gating a survival switch at high height should focus anti-volatility behavior where it matters most.
